ham.subject: Order Confirmation – Ergonomic Office Chair – PO#123456
ham.body:
Hi Alex,

Thank you for purchasing the new ergonomic office chair (SKU: CHR-ERG-001) for the Marketing department. Below are the order details:

• Order ID: 123456
• Item: Ergonomic Office Chair – Black Finish
• Quantity: 10
• Unit Price: $129.99
• Total: $1,299.90
• Shipping: Expedited – Delivered by March 15, 2026
• Tracking Number: 9400110200834523456789

The payment was processed successfully via the internal procurement portal. Your items will be dispatched from our eastern warehouse tomorrow.

If you have any questions or need to make adjustments, please reply to this email or contact the Purchasing Team at purchasing@corp.com.

Best regards,

Jordan Lee
Procurement Specialist
Corporate Procurement
Phone: (555) 123‑4567

spam.subject: Urgent: Account Suspended – Immediate Verification Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We regret to inform you that your account with PaySecure has been flagged for suspicious activity. As per our compliance regulations, your account will be **suspended** within **24 hours** if no action is taken.

Please verify your account information immediately to avoid any service interruption:

• Full Name
• Date of Birth
• Current Billing Address
• Last Four Digits of SSN

Click the link below to verify:

<URL>

Failure to comply will result in permanent account closure and potential legal action. This is not a test; it is a direct security measure.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,

Security Team
PaySecure
